title: BLUELIGHT APT37 Kill Chain Correlation
description: Hunting query that correlates multiple BLUELIGHT (S0657) kill chain stages on the same host. Detects hosts exhibiting 3+ stages of the BLUELIGHT attack chain within 24 hours: browser exploitation, C2 setup, discovery, credential theft, and exfiltration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs') and ('Event ID' = '1' or 'Event ID' = '3' or 'Event ID' = '10' or 'Event ID' = '11' or 'Event ID' = '12' or 'Event ID' = '13') | stats count as TotalEvents, distinctcount('Event ID') as StageCount by 'Host Name (Server)' | where StageCount >= 3 | sort -TotalEvents
